title: Grappa (disambiguation)
content:
'''Grappa''' could refer to:

'''Individuals'''
*'''[[Grappa (Rodian)|Grappa]]''', a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]
*'''[[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]]''', a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]

'''Foodstuffs'''
